task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into Rocket.Chat as admin.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rocket.Chat main workspace or administration dashboard is visible, indicating the agent is no longer on the login screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the Roles/Permissions management section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Administration' panel is open, specifically showing the 'Workspace' -> 'Permissions' or 'Roles' interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the new role was created with the correct name, description, and scope.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A role named 'release-manager' is visible in the roles list or role creation/edit panel. The description field shows 'Manages release channels and announcements' and the scope is set to 'Users'.

task_completion.description: Verify the specific permissions were granted to the new role.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Permissions matrix, the checkboxes for 'pin-message', 'archive-room', 'create-c', and 'edit-room' are checked in the column corresponding to the 'release-manager' role.

task_completion.description: Verify the role was assigned to the correct user while retaining their default role.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The user profile or edit screen for 'agent.user' is visible, and their assigned roles list includes both 'user' and 'release-manager'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Rocket.Chat web interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show interaction with the web browser and Rocket.Chat UI, not terminal windows executing curl commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Rocket.Chat application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar should show the local Rocket.Chat URL, and the interface should be the genuine Rocket.Chat application, not a text editor or mock-up.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the visual output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (Inspect Element/Console) should not be open and modifying the DOM to fake role names or permissions.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target role name: 'release-manager'. Target role description: 'Manages release channels and announcements'. Target role scope: 'Users'. Target permissions to grant: 'pin-message', 'archive-room', 'create-c', 'edit-room'. Target user to assign the role to: 'agent.user'.
